intent_head: Who has the next upcoming birthday? If there is a tie on the date, include every matching person. Answer with exact names only, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap requirements with tree, AGENTS.md, and context; inspected 99_system per root AGENTS.md; used 10_entities/cast as the authoritative source for birthdays.
function.outcome_justification: AGENTS.MD and 10_entities/cast/AGENTS.MD state cast files are authoritative for birthdays. A search across 10_entities/cast found birthday-bearing records; comparing their month-day values to today's date from context (2026-03-30) showed the earliest upcoming birthday is 05-21. Reading 10_entities/cast/tobias.md confirmed the exact canonical name Tobias Kern and birthday 1986-05-21.
